fields.explainEn: Number of sectors for the disk.
Health status of the Ethernet interface.
IPv4 address of the Ethernet interface.
MAC address of the Ethernet interface.
Running status of the Ethernet interface.

fields.explainZh: 建议阈值，对容量配额，单位是GB，文件数配额，单位是K个。
fields.explainEn: Recommended threshold. The unit is GB for capacity quota and K for file number quota.

fields.explainZh: 可用值，对容量配额，单位是GB，文件数配额，单位是K个。
fields.explainEn: Available quota. The unit is GB for capacity quota and K for file number quota.

fields.explainZh: 指定配额限制容量或文件数。
fields.explainEn: Method used for quota calculation, which can be capacity or file number.

fields.explainZh: 软阈值超过多少天后限制写入。
fields.explainEn: Prohibits data writes when the soft threshold is exceeded for the specified number of days.

fields.explainZh: 硬阈值，对容量配额，单位是GB，文件数配额，单位是K个。
fields.explainEn: Hard threshold. The unit is GB for capacity quota and K for file number quota.

fields.explainZh: 软阈值，对容量配额，单位是GB，文件数配额，单位是K个。
fields.explainEn: Soft threshold. The unit is GB for capacity quota and K for file number quota.

fields.explainZh: 配额类型，包括计算配额和强制配额。计算配额只计算用户空间使用情况，不作阈值限制。
fields.explainEn: Quota type, which can be calculating or mandatory. The calculating quota only calculates user space usage, and it does not restrict data operations by using thresholds.

fields.explainZh: 已用值，对容量配额，单位是GB，文件数配额，单位是K个。
fields.explainEn: Used quota. The unit is GB for capacity quota and K for file number quota.
Domain name of the distributed file system.
ID of the distributed file system.

fields.explainZh: 分布式文件系统的名称。
fields.explainEn: Name of the distributed file system.
Size of the distributed file system.
State of the distributed file system.
Used space of the distributed file system.

fields.explainZh: 测试IP对应资源的协议连接。
fields.explainEn: Test the protocol connections of the resource corresponding to an IP address.
